Motion For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar Oct-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter was not called. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. In re: PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion For Order Establishing Admissions - The Motion is denied as moot per CCP section 2033.220(c). No sanctions. The notice of motion did not request sanctions.

Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
